resources.string: One-tap OAuth — no API tokens to paste
Secure OAuth 2.0 · no API token pasting
Grant only what you need — adjust anytime by signing in again
View tunnels; with write access, create tunnels and configure public hostname routes
Dev mode · security level · purge cache
Select a domain to see details
More permissions needed. Go to Settings, sign out, then sign in again to grant access for this feature.
No app can open this file
No data in this table yet
Only changed columns are submitted. Leave a NULL column empty to keep it NULL.
Current authorization doesn\'t include D1 write access (d1.write).
Read-only: KV write access not granted
Read-only: DNS edit access not granted
Waiting for logs… they appear live once the Worker is triggered
Temporarily bypass cache, auto-off after 3 hours
Show a challenge page to all visitors
This clears all cached content for this domain at Cloudflare\'s edge and may briefly raise origin load.
Read-only: Snippets write access not granted
Read-only: WAF write access not granted
This can\'t be undone; the rule stops applying immediately.
Secure sign-in via OAuth 2.0 — no API tokens to paste. Tap an account to view permissions or sign out.
Unlock multiple accounts, storage, live logs and advanced analytics
Important changes are pushed during background refresh.
Turn on to get alerts when a domain\'s status changes or a Worker errors.
Check the live status of Cloudflare\'s components.
This removes the account\'s sign-in from this device. You can sign in again anytime.
This is your last account; signing out returns you to the login screen.
Billed via Google Play, cancel anytime.
Enter a root domain you already own (e.g. example.com), without www or https://.
After adding, Cloudflare assigns two nameservers. Sign in to your registrar and switch the NS to them to activate the domain.
Sign in to the registrar where you bought this domain.
Remove the existing nameservers and replace them with the two Cloudflare addresses above.
Save changes. Activation usually takes minutes to hours, up to 24 hours.
Cloudflare hasn’t returned nameservers yet. Check the domain details or the Cloudflare dashboard later.
The primary location sets where the primary replica lives. Choose “Automatic” to let Cloudflare place it nearby.
This permanently deletes the database %1$s and all its tables and data. This cannot be undone or recovered.
Type the database name to confirm
Secret values can’t be read for security; the list shows names only. Adding the same name overwrites it.
Read-only with the current authorization (missing workers-scripts.write).
Plain-text variables, readable and editable. Editing one doesn’t affect other bindings.
Letters, digits, underscore; must not start with a digit.
KV / D1 / R2 and other resource bindings are shown here; edit them with Wrangler or the dashboard.
Add a cron expression to run this Worker on a schedule.
Standard 5 fields: minute hour day month weekday (UTC).
When enabled, the Worker is reachable at script.subdomain.workers.dev.
workers.dev subdomain isn’t enabled for this account
Point a domain/subdomain straight at this Worker, no DNS or certificate setup needed.
Use a URL pattern (e.g. example.com/api/*) to send matching requests to this Worker.
Full hostname; must belong to the selected domain.
URL pattern, wildcards allowed, e.g. example.com/*.
Creates a remotely-managed tunnel (configured via the dashboard / this app).
Install cloudflared on the target machine and run the command below as an administrator to connect the tunnel.
The token is equivalent to tunnel credentials. Keep it safe and don’t share it publicly.
No public hostnames yet. Add one below.
Map a public domain to a local service. A proxied CNAME is created automatically when you add one.
This tunnel is locally managed (config.yml); manage public hostnames in the cloudflared config file.
Removes disconnected connection records; active cloudflared instances reconnect automatically.
This deletes the tunnel and drops its connections. This cannot be undone.
cloudflared forwards requests for this hostname to this local address.
Feedback and suggestions are sent to our email with version and device info (no tokens or secrets).
View certificates, toggle Universal SSL, delete advanced certs
View and edit URL rewrites and request/response header rules
View and manage IP / ASN / country access rules
One full URL per line, up to %1$d. e.g. https://%2$s/style.css
No encryption between visitors and Cloudflare.
Encrypted from visitor to Cloudflare, not to the origin.
Encrypted end to end, but the origin certificate isn’t verified.
Encrypted end to end and verifies the origin certificate — most secure.
Redirect all HTTP requests to HTTPS.
Rewrite http resource links on the page to https.
A free certificate issued and renewed automatically by Cloudflare.
This advanced / custom certificate pack will be deleted; visitors may briefly fail to establish a secure connection.
(A diagnostic log is attached — request paths/status codes only, no tokens or secrets)
Target object not confirmed after copy; the source was kept and not deleted
When on, objects can be downloaded publicly via the r2.dev subdomain.
Account overview: a daybreak skylight card of today’s total requests
View and edit bulk redirect lists
View load balancers, pools and health
View and edit Access apps and Gateway rules
View projects and deployments, trigger redeploys
One code activates up to 2 devices · Refundable within 30 days on the website
Invalid code, please check and retry
This code is no longer valid (may be refunded)
This code reached its device limit (max 2). Reset bound devices on the website.
Deactivating removes Pro from this device and frees one device slot. Continue?
A new version is available. We recommend updating.
Install failed, retry or download from the website
Read-only access, editing unavailable (no write permission)
Caching will no longer follow this rule. This can\'t be undone.
Don\'t cache if origin has no directive
Read-only access, editing unavailable (no write permission)
Traffic will no longer be limited. This can\'t be undone.
Added — check your inbox for verification
Mail to this address will no longer be forwarded.
Cloudflare sends a verification email; the address can be a forward target once verified.
No audit records in the last 30 days
Lowercase letters, digits and underscores; start with a letter
No redirects in this list yet
No load balancers on this zone
View and toggle DNS / HTTP / Network policies
Read-only access, can\'t toggle (no write permission)
e.g. any(dns.domains[*] == \"example.com\"); empty matches all. Cloudflare validates on save.
Worker scripts, live logs, variables and triggers
Fill conditions to preview the expression here
e.g. block requests from a country hitting /admin
Ask the assistant about Cloudflare, powered by Workers AI cloud inference.
Enable Workers AI on the account (grant Workers AI read/write when authorizing).
Cloudflare assistant powered by Workers AI
Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only
Start with lowercase letter/digit; may contain hyphen and underscore

Note: this app can\'t read existing Worker source (Cloudflare blocks that endpoint for OAuth); creating or replacing requires full code. Manage bindings (vars/secrets/KV) separately in Worker details.
Pick a static site to deploy: a single file, or a ZIP of the whole site. Uploaded directly to Pages (no Git needed).
Sends one user message and shows the model\'s reply. Uses your account\'s Workers AI quota (10,000 free Neurons per day).
Running a text-generation model requires Workers AI write permission (ai.write). Sign out and authorize again with that permission enabled.
This model\'s input/output format differs from text generation, so it can\'t be run in the app yet.
RDAP is not available for this TLD
Handy network tools, no sign-in required
A / AAAA / CNAME / MX / TXT / NS / CAA
Look up DNS records for a domain
Send an HTTPS request, see the response
See the Cloudflare colo your request hits
Get an endpoint and push to this device with curl or a script
Bark-compatible endpoint — notify with a curl
Push is not configured in this build.
Register this device and get your endpoint
A test message from Orange Cloud
Push selected alerts to this device
Needs notification access — sign in again and grant Notifications.
Enable push in Push Center first.
No alert types available for this account.
Push Cloudflare alerts to your device
